profile.p: A self-taught Junior Backend Developer. Proficient in Node.js and Linux-based environments.

projects.intro: All projects can be found on

lmo.p: A Typescript webapp for locking away a string, e.g. a password, for a specifed amount of time.
li: GPG wrapper, to handle encryption and key generation
Local setup, database and app run on my own server

po.p: A Node/Express/Mongo webapp, for managing current and future projects (all projects in an overview, not individual projects themselves).
li: REST API, to insert/edit/remove cards/projects from the database
Account management, to change username/password and the deletion of account/account data
Public API, to programmatically access your own data

mr.p: A node command-line interface to simplify the download of manga.
li: Scraper, to download the images from all the supported providers
Interface, for user input and the visualization the download process
Test Driven Development, to create unit tests and code at the same time

education.result: Includes 6 months of intership at a startup. NC: 1,2
education.schoolsDesc: Except for elementary schools, I've attended waldorf schools.

interests.p: Usually I'm tinkering with my open source projects or my linux machine. For relaxtion I enjoy card/boardgames, reading comics or going for a walk.
